CREATE TABLE businessService (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), serviceType VARCHAR(255), description TEXT);
INSERT INTO businessService (name, serviceType, description) VALUES ('Service A', 'Type 1', 'Description for Service A');
INSERT INTO businessService (name, serviceType, description) VALUES ('Service B', 'Type 2', 'Description for Service B');
INSERT INTO businessService (name, serviceType, description) VALUES ('Service C', 'Type 3', 'Description for Service C');
UPDATE businessService SET description = 'Updated Description for Service A' WHERE name = 'Service A';
SELECT * FROM businessService WHERE serviceType IN (SELECT serviceType FROM businessService WHERE id < 10);
SELECT bs1.name FROM businessService bs1 JOIN businessService bs2 ON bs1.serviceType = bs2.serviceType WHERE bs1.id <> bs2.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM businessService WHERE LENGTH(description) > 100;
DELETE FROM businessService WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM businessService);
INSERT INTO businessService (name, serviceType, description) SELECT 'Service D', 'Type 4', 'Description for Service D' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM businessService WHERE name = 'Service D');
